PROGRAM RELATED INVESTMENTS (PRIS) ARE AN INTEGRAL PART OF THE FOUNDATION'S EXEMPT PROGRAMS AND ARE UNDERTAKEN TO COMPLEMENT AND EXTEND ITS GRANTMAKING ACTIVITIES. PRIS ARE MADE TO FURTHER THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S MISSION AND VISION. PRIS ARE GENERALLY MADE AS LOANS ALTHOUGH OTHER INVESTMENT TYPES MAY BE USED AS ALLOWED UNDER IRC SECTION 4944. EACH PRI MEETS THE FOLLOWING THREE REQUIREMENTS: A) THE THE PRIMARY PURPOSE IS TO ACCOMPLISH ONE OR MORE OF THE FOUNDATION'S EXEMPT PURPOSES; B) PRODUCTION OF INCOME OR APPRECIATION OF PROPERTY IS NOT A SIGNIFICANT PURPOSE; AND C) PRI FUNDS ARE NOT USED TO INFLUENCE LEGISLATION OR TAKE PART IN POLITICAL CAMPAIGNS ON BEHALF OF CANDIDATES. SEE PART VIII-B AND STATEMENTS 20 AND 21 FOR A DESCRIPTION OF THE CHARITABLE PURPOSE OF EACH PRI MADE IN 2023.
GUARANTEE FEE INCOME IS RELATED TO PROGRAM-RELATED INVESTMENTS.
GRANT REFUND INTEREST INCOME REPRESENTS INTEREST EARNED BY GRANTEES ON GRANT FUNDS THAT WERE NOT USED AND HAVE BEEN REFUNDED TO THE ENDOWMENT

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: (1) CENTER FOR HEALTHY COMMUNITIES AT THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENTTHE CENTER FOR HEALTHY COMMUNITIES (THE CENTER) IS COMPRISED OF VENUES IN LOS ANGELES, OAKLAND, AND SACRAMENTO, PROVIDING MEETING SPACES TO MOBILIZE COMMUNITY AND CIVIC LEADERS, HEALTH PROVIDERS, ADVOCATES AND POLICYMAKERS IN THE SEARCH FOR SOLUTIONS TO CALIFORNIA'S CRITICAL HEALTH AND HEALTHCARE ISSUES.THE CENTER OFFERS A VARIETY OF PROGRAMS AND SERVICES THROUGHOUT CALIFORNIA, INCLUDING CONFERENCE CENTERS, AND RESEARCH AND TRAINING FACILITIES. BY COMBINING ALL THESE RESOURCES IN ONE ACCESSIBLE LOCATION, THE CENTER AIMS TO BECOME THE PREMIER VENUE FOR ACTIVITIES ADDRESSING CALIFORNIA'S HEALTH CHALLENGES, AND A LAUNCH PAD FOR COLLABORATIVE ACTION.THE CENTER PROVIDES: - MEETING SPACES AVAILABLE FREE OF CHARGE, FOR QUALIFIED NONPROFIT ORGANIZATIONS WHOSE PROGRAMS ADVANCE THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S MISSION TO EXPAND ACCESS TO AFFORDABLE, QUALITY HEALTHCARE FOR UNDERSERVED INDIVIDUALS AND COMMUNITIES, AND TO PROMOTE FUNDAMENTAL IMPROVEMENTS IN THE HEALTH STATUS OF ALL CALIFORNIANS. - PUBLIC EVENT MANAGEMENT SERVICES INCLUDING EVEN SUPPORT, EVENT PUBLICITY AND AUDIENCE MANAGEMENT - ONLINE LEARNING COMMUNITY

(2) MEDIA CAMPAIGNS BY THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT - M. ENTERTAINMENTM. ENTERTAINMENT PROVIDED THE MEDIA-BUY SERVICES TO THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT (TCE) INCLUDING THE FOLLOWING CAMPAIGNS:"HEALTH4ALL" - SOCIAL MEDIA PROMOTION OF TCE'S HEALTH4ALL CAMPAIGN. "BELONGING CAMPAIGN" - BILLBOARDS AND DIGITAL ADVERTISEMENTS PROMOTING TCE'S BELONGING CAMPAIGN IN CALIFORNIA. "GONDOLA CAMPAIGN" - CAMPAIGN TO BRING AWARENESS TO THE PROPOSED GONDOLA PROJECT IN CHINATOWN LOS ANGELES. "VOTING CAMPAIGN" - INCREASE ELECTION AWARENESS AND PROMOTE VOTING IN CALIFORNIA.

(3) EVERYDAY IMPACT COUNSELINGTHE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT (TCE) ENGAGED EVERYDAY IMPACT CONSULTING MAINLY FOR THE FOLLOWING:TO SUPPORT THE COORDINATION AND FACILITATION OF A ROBUST PLANNING PROCESS, INCLUSIVE OF COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT, THAT LEADS TO THE DEVELOPMENT OF A FRAMEWORK WITH STRATEGIES FOR ADVANCING A SYSTEM OF HEALTH AND WELL-BEING FOR ALL CALIFORNIANS.

(4) LAMONT DIGITAL, LLCTHE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT (TCE) ENGAGED LAMONT DIGITAL, LLC MAINLY FOR THE FOLLOWING:TO SUPPORT THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S VARIOUS SOCIAL MEDIA CHANNELS TO AMPLIFY A MESSAGE OF HEALTH FOR ALL CALIFORNIANS AND TO SUPPORT AND MANAGE THE CALIFORNIA ENDOWMENT'S SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORMS TO ELEVATE THE THEME OF HEALTH AND RACE EQUITY IN CALIFORNIA.
